text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd congratulates Eishin Flash with a
standing ovation. She smiles proudly at the
thought that it's her turn to become an obstacle
for the coming generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pages of her future schedule are completely
blank. What path will she take? How will she
forge onward?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortsetzung folgt—that is to be determined, and
the rest is up to us.
